% Generated preamble -- regenerated every run. Do not edit; edit main.tex instead.
\documentclass[journal=jacsat,manuscript=article]{achemso}
\usepackage{amsmath}
\usepackage{amssymb}
\usepackage{bm}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage[colorlinks=true,linkcolor=blue,citecolor=blue,urlcolor=blue]{hyperref}
% NOTE (achemso-specific, see manifest.yaml's ARCHITECTURE FINDING): unlike
% every other journal folder, no \bibliographystyle{...} line is emitted here
% -- achemso.cls sets it internally and an explicit line collides with that
% ("Illegal, another \bibstyle command", verified empirically).
%
% achemso's \title/\author/\affiliation/\email/\keywords are \@onlypreamble
% commands that MUST run before \begin{document}, but this repo's fixed
% main.tex only \inputs{generated/metadata} AFTER \begin{document}. Pulling
% the same file in here, early, means it is read once while still in the
% preamble (satisfying achemso) and once again for real from main.tex, in the
% body. metadata.tex.j2's \ifdefined guard makes the two reads emit different
% content -- see that file's matching comment for the other half of this.
\input{generated/metadata}
